title: ranunculus aquatilis var. divaricatus
intro: Ranunculus aquatilis var. divaricatus, also known as the aquatic buttercup or var. divaricatus, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Ranunculaceae, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and ability to thrive in shallow water. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus aquatilis var. divaricatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, for use in treating various health conditions.
